raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr fakkat juhß: Ta
Klunga Jetſch ne irr pareiſi. Klan-
tajt tad juhß no ta Israëta
Namna / woj mans Jetſch ne
irr pareiſi? woj ne wiſswairak
juhtu Jetſti irr nepareiſi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tas Taisnajs no ta-
was Taisnibas nogreescbahs/ un
darra Netaifnibu / un nomirſt
eeſch tahß/ tad nomirſt wiſch
eeſch tahß Netaifnibas / ko
wiſch irr darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad tas Besdeewi-
gajß atgreeschahs no ſawas Bes-
Deewibas/ ko wiſch irr darrijs/
un darra kas teefa un taisns irr/
tas patureehs ſawu Dwehfeli
dſihwu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz ka wiſch peeran-
ga/ un atgreeschahs no wiſſahm
ſawahm Bahrkahptchanahm/ ko
wiſch irr darrijs/ tad wiſch tee-
ſcham dſihwohs/ wiſch ne no-
mirſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tonehr Israëka Namã
fakka: Ta Klunga Jetſch ne irr
pareiſi. Woj ne buhtu manni
Jetſti ak Israëka Namã! pareiſi?
woj ne wiſswairak juhtu Jetſti
irr nepareiſi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht teefafchu es juhß
no ta Israëka Namma/ iſkatru
pehz ſaweem Zelteem/ fakka tas
Kungã KUNGÃ: Atgreese-
tees/ un greeseetes atpakkaß no
wiſſahm juhſahm Bahrkahpscha-
n/ tad tas Moseegums jums
hs par Beedausſchaniu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weeteet no jums no
wiſas juhſas Pahrkahpschand
ar ko juhß effat pahrkahpuſd
un darrajt jums weenu jau
Sirði/ un jaunu Garru. Jo
pehz gribbat juhß nomirt / ju
no ta Namma Israëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo man ne patihe
Nahwe ta/ kas mirſt/ takka
Klungã KUNGÃ: Tapehz
greeseetees un dſihwojeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XIX. Nodalla.
Ezekiels noschehlo Jojakima un Joakafa
tumu/ kas zaur divi jauneem nikneem
wahm ecihmehts tobß: 1/ 2. Aprakſa
paſchu zaur weenu Lihdſibu no weena kra-
na Wihuq-Rohla/ kurra Augti fakalß/
kurra Corri norauti unsabedſinati tobß:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Et tu pazell wee
Rauda- Dseefimu pi
Israëta Leel-Kungee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fakki: Kahda bija ta-
Mahte? weena Lauwu-Ma
ſtarp teem Lauwahmi apgu-
mees/ wiſna usaudſnaja jan
Behrnus ſtarp teem jaune-
Lauwahmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna usaudſin
weenu no ſaweem Behruee
tas tappe weens jauns Lau-
un mahzijahs Laupijumu i
piht/ wiſch aprihje Zilwekus
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad to no wiſka te
Tautas dsirdeja / tad tappe
guhtihts winnu Bedrẽ / un
wedde winnu ar Schlehdehn-
Egiptes-Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad wiſka nu redſeja/
winna welki bij zerrefſi/ un n
nas Gatdiſhana iſuudduſi /
nehme winna weenu zittu no
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
